subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast loosened thy tongue in praise of the Sun of Glory! Verily the Day-Star of the Covenant hath risen and shone forth with a brilliance that dazzleth the eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من دلع لسانه بالثناء علی شمس البهاء قد اشرق و لاح نیر المیثاق اشراقا تشخص
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
